title: Event sharing to groups with configurable visibility levels
body:
## Issue description

This child issue of the **Personal Event Ownership Epic** tracks the implementation and testing of event sharing to groups with configurable visibility levels. Users must be able to share personal events to one or more groups, choose a visibility level per group (busy, title, or details), update the visibility level after sharing, and revoke sharing at any time.

### Current state

**Domain layer (implemented):**
- `EventShare` entity with `id`, `eventId`, `groupId`, `visibilityLevel`, `sharedByUserId`, `sharedAt`, `updatedAt`
- `VisibilityLevel` type: `'busy' | 'title' | 'details'`
- `EventShareRepositoryPort` with methods: `findById`, `findByEventAndGroup`, `listByEvent`, `create`, `updateVisibility`, `delete`

**Application layer (implemented):**
- `ShareEventToGroupUseCase` — only personal events (groupId = null), caller must be owner and group member, prevents duplicates
- `ListEventSharesUseCase` — returns all shares for an event, owner-only
- `UpdateEventShareUseCase` — changes visibility level, owner-only
- `RevokeEventShareUseCase` — deletes share record, owner-only
- Unit tests: `event-share-policy.unit.test.ts` (15+ tests)
- Audit events: `event_share.created`, `event_share.updated`, `event_share.revoked`

**Infrastructure layer (implemented):**
- `KnexEventShareRepository` — full persistence implementation
- NO integration tests exist

**Presentation layer (implemented):**
- `POST /api/v1/events/:eventId/shares` — share event to group (body: `{ groupId, visibilityLevel }`)
- `GET /api/v1/events/:eventId/shares` — list shares for event
- `PATCH /api/v1/events/:eventId/shares/:shareId` — update visibility level
- `DELETE /api/v1/events/:eventId/shares/:shareId` — revoke share
- Router: `event-share.router.ts` (240+ lines)
- NO API-level tests exist

### Remaining work

- **API-level tests are missing** — no `event-share.api.test.ts` to test HTTP request/response handling, status codes, validation, authorization, and error scenarios (409 duplicate, 404 not found, etc.)
- **Integration tests are missing** — no `knex-event-share.repository.integration.test.ts` to test actual persistence, unique constraints, foreign key behavior
- Verify edge cases: sharing group-scoped events is rejected, non-owner sharing is rejected, non-member sharing is rejected

---

## High-level requirements / Expected behavior

1. **Share** — `POST /api/v1/events/:eventId/shares` creates a share record linking event to group with specified visibility level
2. **List** — `GET /api/v1/events/:eventId/shares` returns all shares for the event (owner-only)
3. **Update** — `PATCH /api/v1/events/:eventId/shares/:shareId` allows changing visibility level (owner-only)
4. **Revoke** — `DELETE /api/v1/events/:eventId/shares/:shareId` removes the share (owner-only)
5. Only personal events (groupId = null) can be shared — group-scoped events must be rejected
6. Caller must be the event owner to perform any sharing operation
7. Caller must be a member of the target group to share to it
8. Duplicate shares to the same group must be rejected (409 Conflict)
9. Visibility levels control what group members can see: busy (times only), title (times + title), details (full event)
10. Sharing creates audit trail entries
11. Revoking a share immediately removes group members' access to the event

---

## Additional notes

### Key files
- Domain: `src/modules/event-sharing/domain/event-share.ts`, `event-share.repository.port.ts`
- Use cases: `src/modules/event-sharing/application/{share-event-to-group,list-event-shares,update-event-share,revoke-event-share}.usecase.ts`
- Router: `src/modules/event-sharing/presentation/event-share.router.ts`
- Repository: `src/modules/event-sharing/infrastructure/knex-event-share.repository.ts`
- Unit tests: `src/modules/event-sharing/application/event-share-policy.unit.test.ts`

### Security constraints
- Only event owner can share/update/revoke — enforced in application layer
- All 4 use cases enforce personal-event-only guard (`groupId === null`) before owner check to prevent cross-group event disclosure
- Non-owners receive NOT_FOUND (not FORBIDDEN) to prevent information leakage
- Group membership is verified before allowing share creation

### Parent epic
Personal Event Ownership — Shift from Group-Owned to User-Owned Events

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `POST /api/v1/events/:eventId/shares` creates share with correct visibility level
- [ ] Sharing rejects group-scoped events (groupId not null)
- [ ] Sharing rejects non-owner callers
- [ ] Sharing rejects callers who are not members of the target group
- [ ] Duplicate shares to the same group return 409 Conflict
- [ ] `GET /api/v1/events/:eventId/shares` returns all shares for owner, 404 for non-owner
- [ ] `PATCH /api/v1/events/:eventId/shares/:shareId` updates visibility level for owner
- [ ] `DELETE /api/v1/events/:eventId/shares/:shareId` removes share for owner
- [ ] Audit events are recorded for share creation, update, and revocation
- [ ] API-level tests exist for all 4 endpoints covering happy path, validation, authorization, and error cases
- [ ] Integration tests exist for `KnexEventShareRepository` covering persistence, unique constraints, and foreign key behavior
- [ ] Unit tests pass (15+ tests in event-share-policy.unit.test.ts)
- [ ] All existing tests continue to pass
- [ ] CI passes
